data.title: GREEN: Implement AcliClient.delete_issue_link()
data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Description
Implement AcliClient.delete_issue_link(link_id) as an instance method on the AcliClient class. Wraps ACLI Go binary to delete a specific Jira issue link by its ID.

## Implementation Details
- Add delete_issue_link(link_id) method to AcliClient class
- Use ACLI Go command: jira workitem link delete --id <link_id> (or equivalent)
- Follow existing AcliClient method patterns (self._run(), raises on error)
- Caller is responsible for 404 handling semantics

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/scripts/acli-integration.py (Edit: add delete_issue_link method to AcliClient)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] AcliClient has delete_issue_link(link_id) instance method
  Verify: grep -q "def delete_issue_link" plugins/dso/scripts/acli-integration.py
- [ ] RED tests from task a62b-60b5 now pass
  Verify: poetry run pytest tests/scripts/test_bridge_outbound.py -k "delete_issue_link" --tb=short -q
